fn_def_list.fn_code:
USI
spr_psr_get_handler (SIM_CPU *current_cpu)
{
  int psr = ((GET_H_PSR_IMPLE () & 0xf) << 28) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_VER   () & 0xf) << 24) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_ICE   () & 0x1) << 16) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_NEM   () & 0x1) << 14) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_CM    () & 0x1) << 13) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_BE    () & 0x1) << 12) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_ESR   () & 0x1) << 11) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_EF    () & 0x1) <<  8) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_EM    () & 0x1) <<  7) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_PIL   () & 0xf) <<  3) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_S     () & 0x1) <<  2) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_PS    () & 0x1) <<  1) |
            ((GET_H_PSR_ET    () & 0x1)      );

  return psr;
}
